title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: langchain-ai/langchain (Ollama integration)
summary: LangChain LLM interface that calls Ollama’s local REST endpoint for chaining, RAG, agents, etc.

title: ollama-js on npm
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, list, pull models.

title: ollama-python on PyPI
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; sync & async, streaming, embeddings, built-in retries.

title: ollama-webui/ollama-webui (now Open WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich, self-hosted web interface for Ollama with chat history, RAG, user management.

title: jmorganca/ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK repo; examples for chat, streaming, embeddings, and custom model creation.

title: ollama/ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK repo; Deno, Bun, Node examples; ESM & CJS builds.

title: ollama4j – Java/JVM client
summary: Unofficial Java client for Ollama; Kotlin friendly, non-blocking, Maven Central.

title: ollama-rust on crates.io
summary: Community Rust crate wrapping Ollama REST API with Tokio async and serde models.

title: ollama-cli – Go CLI enhancer
summary: Go-based CLI that adds progress bars, batch pulls, and YAML config to Ollama workflows.

title: ollama-copilot – VS Code extension
summary: VS Code plugin that uses local Ollama models for inline code suggestions and chat.

title: ollama-helm – Kubernetes Helm charts
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & PVC support.

title: ollama-docker – Official Docker image
summary: Official container image for Ollama (CPU & CUDA) with one-line run commands.

title: ollama-chatbot – React chat component
summary: Lightweight React component that streams Ollama chat completions with Markdown rendering.

title: ollama-rag – Minimal RAG example
summary: Python repo showing how to combine Ollama + Chroma for retrieval-augmented generation.

title: ollama-discord – Discord bot
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers users via Ollama models; slash commands, thread support.

title: ollama-slack – Slack bot integration
summary: Python Slack Bolt app that exposes Ollama models in channels/DMs with rate limiting.

title: reddit/r/ollama – Community discussions
summary: Active subreddit for sharing tips, model recommendations, and troubleshooting Ollama.

title: Hacker News – Show HN: Ollama
summary: Launch thread with maintainer comments and community feedback on Ollama v0.1.

title: ollama-terraform – Terraform provider
summary: Experimental Terraform provider to declaratively manage Ollama models and configurations.
